'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=8.N6JKeuk7sUYuwbDTAct32.5fwFvwa2wZ.fftpRAT8-1773808251-1.0.1.1-gXPa8c.xKuv56.2H1Ac8pS6aKiHURf_nNAHG_cHcvyc"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
